organic_results.title: machin: a Go-flavored, machine-first language
organic_results.snippet: MFL compiles through C to a single native binary. Plain-text source, one declaration per line, type-inferred & machine-first.

organic_results.title: Show HN: Machin, a tiny language that compiles to one binary
organic_results.snippet: A small "machine-first" language with no runtime — discussion and benchmarks vs Go and Rust.

organic_results.title: Machin (programming language) - Wikipedia
organic_results.snippet: Machin is a statically typed language developed by Javier Mosch. It transpiles to C and produces a single static binary.
